input.user_input: Add a force majeure clause to this supply agreement. Use the ISDA standard definition as a starting point.

actual:
It looks like you haven't uploaded the supply agreement yet. Please upload the document you would like me to modify. 

Once you upload it, I can add a force majeure clause modeled on the ISDA standard definition—specifically focusing on events beyond the control of the affected party (including acts of state) that prevent performance and could not be overcome by using all reasonable efforts. 

Let me know if you'd prefer me to generate a brand-new supply agreement with this clause included instead!
